title: LowSword
description: A pack for lower sword in minecraft 1.21.11
body:
## LowSword
**A Low-Sword texture pack to have a clear view in minecraft pvp. Avoid the sword to fill up your screen. Its vanilla-like sword texture. Any bug pls report at [discord](https://discord.gg/XzawdSEKeJ)**
